current_blocker: None. All systems operational. v0.3.25 deployed with hostname resolution, device event analysis, WinRM fallback, auto-recovery.

architecture_decision.rationale: DD disk images cause hardware-specific failures (ESP timeouts, firmware mismatches). nixos-install from flake works on any x86_64 hardware.
key_files: iso/appliance-image.nix (installer ISO with dialog TUI + msp-auto-install)

agent_decision.deprecated: Python compliance-agent (packages/compliance-agent/) — DO NOT USE for new work
agent_decision.rationale: Go daemon is production-ready with full L1/L2/L3 healing, Windows+Linux+macOS scanning, evidence chain, flap detection, learning flywheel, fleet updates, auto-deploy, AD discovery, WoL. 17x less RAM, 6000x faster startup, 73x smaller binary.

daemon_v0_3_24_changes: Checkin resilience: recreate HTTP client after 3 consecutive failures
TOFU pin auto-clear: delete stale pin on TLS cert rotation
Fleet order fallback: GET /api/fleet/orders/pending when checkin broken
ARP MAC fix: read /proc/net/arp column 3 instead of local interface MAC
Linux/macOS scan timer fix: don't burn interval on empty targets
Wake-on-LAN: probe SSH before macOS scan, send WoL if sleeping
Rule signature enforcement: configurable RequireSignedRules flag
backend_session_181_changes: Checkin consistency: device_sync + evidence submission heartbeat site_appliances
Gzip auth: require_appliance_auth decompresses gzip bodies
Always deliver credentials in checkin (removed has_local_credentials gate)
Flywheel: L2-only eligibility, runbook validation, rate limit 5/cycle
Flywheel: post-promotion monitoring auto-disables <70% success in 48h
Offline alerting: partner email on 15min offline
Runbook category cleanup: migration 094, 0 general remaining
data_cleanup_session_181: 20 orphan L1 rules disabled (AUTO-*, L2-*, run_*)
nixos_generation + WIN-DEPLOY-UNREACHABLE disabled for both sites
34 home network devices (192.168.0.x) deleted from VM site
Appliances (.241, .254) reclassified from unknown to appliance

quick_commands.check_logs: ssh root@178.156.162.116 "docker exec mcp-postgres psql -U mcp -d mcp -c \"SELECT site_id, count(*) FROM log_entries GROUP BY site_id\""
quick_commands.appliance_status: ssh root@178.156.162.116 "docker exec mcp-postgres psql -U mcp -d mcp -c 'SELECT site_id, agent_version, last_checkin FROM appliances ORDER BY last_checkin DESC'"

backend_session_182_changes: IDOR fix: GET /organizations/{org_id} now requires auth + org_scope check
IDOR fix: org_credentials endpoints now enforce org_scope validation
N+1 elimination: org list uses single site→org mapping query
Pagination: limit/offset/status filter on org list endpoint
New endpoint: GET /organizations/{org_id}/health — consolidated compliance, incidents, healing, fleet, categories
New endpoint: GET /organizations/{org_id}/incidents — paginated with site/severity/status filters
PHI boundary: phi_boundary.py strips IPs, hostnames, raw output from client portal evidence
Partner portal: GET /api/partners/me/orgs — org list with consolidated metrics
Partner portal: GET/PUT /api/partners/me/orgs/{org_id}/drift-config — bulk org-level drift config
Migration 095: sub_partner_id column on sites for future sub-partner support
Frontend: OrgDashboard wired to health endpoint with severity breakdown, fleet status, category compliance
daemon_v0_3_25_changes: Reverse DNS hostname resolution on ARP-discovered devices
Windows Event Log analysis (on-prem only, 22 HIPAA-relevant event IDs)
Critical security events (audit log cleared) generate incidents
WinRM direct fallback when DC proxy fails (3-tier: DC admin → DC proxy → local admin)
Nonce cache cleared on execution failures (enables auto-retry)
Fleet order auto-recovery: failed completions expire after 1 hour
completed_this_session: TLS TOFU pin cleared on both appliances
v0.3.25 deployed to both appliances (hostname resolution, event logs, WinRM fallback, auto-recovery)
Org feature audit + full hardening (12 commits: IDOR, N+1, pagination, health, PHI, partner)
Protection Profiles route fix (was 404), Drift Config shows all 47 checks
Device subnet filtering + neighbor device collapse
EV SSL cert swap instructions prepared
Appliance disk image bumped to v0.3.25
